lines.en_lit: GEMARA: The Sages taught: “He shall take two goats” minimum goats two. what the verse states: Two? that the two should be identical. from where even if the two are not identical valid? The verses state goat, goat to amplify
The reason because the Merciful One amplified Doesn’t this the Merciful One did not amplify, I would have said disqualified? From where do we prevented
enter your mind to say two, two, two, is written
And now that the Merciful One has amplified goat, goat, why do I two, two, two? One in appearance, one in height, and one in monetary value.

this was also taught with regard to lambs leper, “He shall take two lambs” minimum lambs, two. what the verse states “two”? that the two should be identical. from where that even if the two are not identical valid? The verses state: Lamb, lamb, to amplify
The reason because the Merciful One amplified Doesn’t this the Merciful One did not amplify, I would have said disqualified? From where do we prevented enter your mind to say it is written: shall be
And now that the Merciful One has amplified lamb, lamb, why do I shall be”? to the rest of the are of the leper,

And we also learned similarly with regard to a leper. birds” minimum birds two. What the verse states: Two? that the two should be identical. And from where that even if they are not identical valid? The verses state: Bird, bird amplify.
The reason because the Merciful One amplified Doesn’t this the Merciful One did not amplify, disqualified? From where do we prevented enter your mind to say it is written: shall be
And now that the Merciful One has amplified bird, why do I shall be”? to the rest of the are of the leper,

If so, daily offerings as well. Let us say lambs minimum lambs is two. What the verse states “two”? that the two should be identical. And from where that even if the two are not identical they are valid? The verse states lamb, lamb amplify. to the mitzva we also require
That is needed for that which was taught “Two day by day” opposite the day.

you say opposite the day, or only obligation of day? When it states: “One lamb you shall offer in the morning, and the other lamb you shall offer in the afternoon” the obligation of day is stated And how do I uphold “Two day by day”? opposite the day.
How daily offering of morning was slaughtered opposite northwest corner on second ring, And of afternoon was slaughtered opposite northeast corner on second ring,
additional offerings Shabbat, certainly that the two should be identical

The Sages taught: slaughtered the two Yom Kippur goats outside when he had not yet drawn lots them he is liable for both of them, after he drew lots them, he is liable for God, and he is exempt for for Azazel,
when he had not yet drawn lots, he is liable for both of them, For what are they fit? Rav Ḥisda said: since they are fit as the goat performed outside.
What is different the goat performed inside not they lack the lottery? They are also unfit as the goat performed outside as they lack the service of the day.
Rav Ḥisda holds not lacking time that day.

Ravina said: Now that Rav Ḥisda said lacking the lottery is comparable to lacking an action that which Rav Yehuda said Shmuel said: Peace-offerings that one slaughtered before the doors of the Sanctuary were opened are disqualified, it is stated “And he shall slaughter it at the entrance to the Tent of Meeting” when is open but not when it is locked.
